item.title: kmiri-helper: query all instances and info in a standalone rustc driver

issue.title: kmiri-helper: query all instances and info in a standalone rustc driver

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+# ~/.codex/config.toml 或项目级的 .codex/config.toml
+
+# 1. 声明启用的默认权限配置文件名称
+default_permissions = "secure-workspace"
+approval_policy = "untrusted"            # 当涉及到敏感操作时仍需要提示确认
+
+# 2. 定义自定义权限配置文件
+[permissions.secure-workspace]
+description = "Secure development workspace that denies specific folders"
+extends = ":workspace"                                                    # 继承官方内置的 `:workspace` 基础配置（即默认允许当前工作区读写）
+
+# 3. 设置全局文件系统拦截
+[permissions.secure-workspace.filesystem]
+":minimal" = "read"  # 允许运行 Shell 必要的基本系统命令（如 bash/sh 的必要依赖）
+"~/.ssh/**" = "deny" # 绝对禁止读取私钥
+"~/.aws/**" = "deny" # 绝对禁止读取凭证
+
+# 4. 针对当前项目工作区根目录（Workspace Roots）配置绝对硬性拦截
+[permissions.secure-workspace.filesystem.":workspace_roots"]
+"." = "write"       # 默认允许在当前工程内进行文件的读写和修改
+"old" = "deny"      # 无条件禁止读取或检索 old 目录
+"old/**" = "deny"   # 无条件禁止读取 old 目录下的所有子文件与子文件夹
+"**/*.env" = "deny" # 顺手封锁项目下所有的环境配置文件

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+[package]
+name = "kmiri-helper"
+version = "0.1.0"
+edition = "2024"
+
+[dependencies]
+serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }
+serde_json = { version = "1.0" }
+log = { version = "0.4", optional = true }
+env_logger = { version = "0.11", optional = true }
+
+[features]
+default = ["dep:log", "dep:env_logger"]
+
+[package.metadata.rust-analyzer]
+rustc_private = true

@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+#!/bin/bash
+
+set -eoux pipefail
+
+cargo install --path . --debug --force
+
+# the driver needs fresh build to work
+cargo clean
+cargo kmiri-helper #-vvv

commit.message:
kmiri-helper: query all instances and info in a standalone rustc driver

Unfortunately, rustc_public crate has bugs as the following error is weird:

error: internal compiler error: /rustc-dev/55e86c996809902e8bbad512cfb4d2c18be446d9/compiler/rustc_middle/src/ty/normalize_erasing_regions.rs:171:13: Failed
to normalize *mut Alias(Projection, AliasTy { args: [I/#0], def_id: DefId(0:27 ~ itoa[eae5]::private::Sealed::Buffer), .. }) in typing_env=TypingEnv { typing
_mode: PostAnalysis, param_env: ParamEnv { caller_bounds: [] } }, maybe try to call `try_normalize_erasing_regions` instead

thread 'rustc' (79573) panicked at /rustc-dev/55e86c996809902e8bbad512cfb4d2c18be446d9/compiler/rustc_middle/src/ty/normalize_erasing_regions.rs:171:13:
Box<dyn Any>
note: run with `RUST_BACKTRACE=1` environment variable to display a backtrace
[src/bin/kmiri-helper/main.rs:23:5] &krate.name = "anstyle"
[src/bin/kmiri-helper/info.rs:46:48] self.fn_def.len() = 122
error: internal compiler error: /rustc-dev/55e86c996809902e8bbad512cfb4d2c18be446d9/compiler/rustc_mir_transform/src/shim.rs:216:13: InstanceKind::Virtual (V
irtual(DefId(1:4262 ~ std[ca0b]::io::Write::write_all), 7)) is for direct calls only

thread 'rustc' (79561) panicked at /rustc-dev/55e86c996809902e8bbad512cfb4d2c18be446d9/compiler/rustc_mir_transform/src/shim.rs:216:13:
Box<dyn Any>
note: run with `RUST_BACKTRACE=1` environment variable to display a backtrace
[src/bin/kmiri-helper/main.rs:23:5] &krate.name = "anstyle_parse"
[src/bin/kmiri-helper/info.rs:46:48] self.fn_def.len() = 94
[src/bin/kmiri-helper/main.rs:23:5] &krate.name = "memchr"
[src/bin/kmiri-helper/info.rs:46:48] self.fn_def.len() = 508
error: internal compiler error: /rustc-dev/55e86c996809902e8bbad512cfb4d2c18be446d9/compiler/rustc_middle/src/ty/normalize_erasing_regions.rs:171:13: Failed
to normalize Alias(Projection, AliasTy { args: [V/#0], def_id: DefId(0:823 ~ memchr[9dea]::vector::Vector::Mask), .. }) in typing_env=TypingEnv { typing_mode
: PostAnalysis, param_env: ParamEnv { caller_bounds: [] } }, maybe try to call `try_normalize_erasing_regions` instead

thread 'rustc' (79542) panicked at /rustc-dev/55e86c996809902e8bbad512cfb4d2c18be446d9/compiler/rustc_middle/src/ty/normalize_erasing_regions.rs:171:13:
Box<dyn Any>
note: run with `RUST_BACKTRACE=1` environment variable to display a backtrace
[src/bin/kmiri-helper/main.rs:23:5] &krate.name = "regex_syntax"
[src/bin/kmiri-helper/info.rs:46:48] self.fn_def.len() = 1515
error: internal compiler error: /rustc-dev/55e86c996809902e8bbad512cfb4d2c18be446d9/compiler/rustc_middle/src/ty/normalize_erasing_regions.rs:171:13: Failed
to normalize Alias(Projection, AliasTy { args: [I/#0], def_id: DefId(0:541 ~ regex_syntax[1275]::hir::interval::Interval::Bound), .. }) in typing_env=TypingE
nv { typing_mode: PostAnalysis, param_env: ParamEnv { caller_bounds: [] } }, maybe try to call `try_normalize_erasing_regions` instead

thread 'rustc' (79550) panicked at /rustc-dev/55e86c996809902e8bbad512cfb4d2c18be446d9/compiler/rustc_middle/src/ty/normalize_erasing_regions.rs:171:13:
Box<dyn Any>
note: run with `RUST_BACKTRACE=1` environment variable to display a backtrace
Try to fix instance resolution ICE via rustc_middle, but still ICE
start reachability from non-generic functions and have accurate local spans
simplify run.sh by handling env vars inside cargo-kmiri-helper
kmiri-helper: make logging dependencies optional features and default enabled

kmiri-helper: skip build-script-build and proc_macro

also handle `rustc --version --verbose` style
cocoindex_code: add settings.yml; ignore the rest local data

kmiri-helper: fix local crate name by keeping crate root name

also replace rustc_public's MirVisitor by internal Visitor
to close https://github.com/KMiri-rs/KMiri/issues/95
